_comment: ILLUSTRATIVE TEMPLATE ONLY — not maintained compliance content.
name: pack:secure-coding-owasp
description: OWASP Top-10 secure coding policy — HIGH risk. Security-reviewer + code-reviewer required; secret-scan gate enforced.

rules.name: require_security_reviewer
rules.description: Security reviewer post-execution review is required for OWASP-scoped tasks.

rules.name: require_code_reviewer
rules.description: Code reviewer must review implementation for OWASP compliance.

rules.name: require_secret_scan_gate
rules.description: Secret scan gate must pass before any authentication or credential code is committed.

rules.name: block_env_files
rules.description: Block writes to .env files — credentials must go through a secret manager.

rules.name: block_credential_files
rules.description: Block writes to known credential file patterns.

rules.name: require_no_hardcoded_credentials
rules.description: No hardcoded credentials — enforce environment variables or a secret manager.
